## Description

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📄 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration / CI change

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] Backend tests pass (`cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] Frontend tests pass (`cd frontend && npx vitest run`)
- [ ] Manual testing (describe steps below)

1. Upload a sample PDF
2. Generate quiz
3. Verify questions appear correctly

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding style
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] All existing tests pass locally
- [ ] I have checked for any breaking changes
